title: iseilema macratherum
intro: Iseilema macratherum, also known as the Bristle Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Iseilema macratherum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
